caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a plain, dark grey background. She is wearing a light green, short-sleeved tunic with small red floral embroidery along the neckline and shoulders, complemented by a dark beaded necklace. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking and gesturing with both hands held up in front of her chest. Her mouth opens wider as she continues to talk, and her hands move slightly, shifting their position as she emphasizes her points. In the bottom-left corner of the scene, a small circular logo is visible alongside the text "NPTEL". The setting remains static, with the woman as the sole focus of the shot, and the only changes occurring through her facial expressions and the motion of her hands as she delivers her presentation.
